programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Frances takes the stage full of energy and ready for fun. Frances does one thing you don't see many female comics do…physical humor, and she delivers it with every silly bone in her body. Her material stems from her life, but she draws both men and women into her world with such a connection, it feels like she is personalizing every joke. In addition to touring nationally, Frances Dilorinzo's credits include appearances on Nick Mom Night Out – Nickelodeon, Last Comic Standing - NBC, Comics Unleashed -ABC, Secret Life of a Soccer Mom -TLC, Real Housewives of Orange County – Bravo, as well as, performing for our troops around the world.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: He is often mistaken for the bouncer, security guard or bachelorette party stripper but rarely a comedian…until he takes the stage. With his passion for comedy and a personality that you can't help but be drawn to, Sean P takes any stage with a mic and makes the audience his own. Sean is immediately likable and will draw you in with his ability to tell stories that make you feel like you were there. Don't let his relaxed style fool you, he will come out blazing and have you laughing until your whole body hurts.

programme.title: Steve Soelberg
programme.desc: Extremely funny comedian and overall nice person Steve Soelberg brings an observational, story telling style of comedy which has repeatedly left his regularly sold out audiences in stitches. Whether he's relating the experiences of growing up in a large family in Seattle, Washington or recounting the time he saw an angry guy in a tutu at a Ragnar relay, he has a way of making each audience member feel as if they were just the person he wanted to tell the story to because he knew they'd enjoy it just as much as he did. Due to his growing popularity as a comedian, he has appeared multiple times on local TV affiliates (Fox, KUTV, and KSL), on the radio, and has entertained tens of thousands traveling the country not only as comedian, but also as the voice of the Ragnar relay races as their race announcer and emcee. Steve's positive, upbeat personality paired with his observational, often self deprecating humor and his ability to appeal to a broad audience guarantee his shows will be a hilarious and memorable experience for all those who attend.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Mike Speenberg has been a professional touring Stand-up comedian for 20 years. He's performed on 5 different continents, entertained everyone from Hall of Fame Athletes to US Diplomats, shared the stage with everyone from Robin Williams to Bill Burr, and been featured on everything from CNN to the AMERICAN FORCES RADIO NETWORK.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Jeffrey Jena is one of the top corporate and cruise comics working today. His thirty-three years of live performance experience and over forty national television shows, both as an actor and comic give him the ability to work for any audience

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Rex has been delighting comedy audiences for 20 years, in world-famous comedy clubs like The Improv, Catch-A-Rising Star, Funny Bones and Zanies, on television for Showtime, Comedy Central and Comic Relief, on radio with Bob & Tom and NPR, cruise ships worldwide, and corporate clients including GM, American Express, Texaco, 3M, Coca-Cola, IBM, Toshiba, Lowe's, Johnson & Johnson, Ameritech, Proctor & Gamble, State Farm, Quaker Oats, Verizon and the IRS (“Working for the IRS is the only sure way to get money from them.”), and numerous non-profit and charitable organizations, such as St. Jude's and the Make-A-Wish Foundation. A former college professor who made the unusual transition to the standup comedy stage in the '80's, Rex has always believed that laughter is the best defense against a confusing and challenging world. Rex's take on marriage and family has propelled him to performances in all 50 states and around the world, including London, Hong Kong, Amsterdam, Bermuda, Montreal, Barcelona, Copenhagen, Aruba, Rome and Cannes.

programme.title: Brandon Vestal
programme.desc: “Brandon Vestal's low key, deeply personal and honest style has made him a fast favorite in the comedy world, a “Don't Miss” for college audiences, and a club favorite. He puts on an amazing show and is a definite must see.”

programme.title: Erica Rhodes
programme.desc: Erica Rhodes is a regular panelist on Comedy Central's @midnight and Fox's Punchline. She has made appearances on SeeSo's The Guest List, Hulu's Coming to the Stage, AXS' Live at Gotham and the syndicated Comics Unleashed. Erica has performed at San Francisco Sketchfest, the Moontower Comedy Festival (Austin, TX), the Blue Whale Comedy Festival (Tulsa, OK), the Boston Comedy Festival and RIOT LA Fest. Recent TV credits include ABC's Modern Family, HBO's Veep, Fox's New Girl, and IFC's Comedy Bang Bang. Erica stars in Audible's Dr. Katz: The Audio Files and ABC Digital's The Off Season. She recurs on TruTV's Fameless and has been a semi-regular performer/writer on NPR's A Prairie Home Companion.

programme.title: Louie Anderson Big Baby Boomer
programme.desc: Veteran funny man Louie Anderson returns to the stage in this hilarious one hour stand up comedy special.

programme.title: Louie Anderson Big Underwear
programme.desc: Iconic comedian Louie Anderson brings you his 6th comedy special, Big Underwear.

programme.title: Ant: America's Ready
programme.desc: Ant is irrevocably one of the funniest talents to come to America's living room.

programme.title: Jinkx Monsoon: Red Head Redemption
programme.desc: Jinkx Monsoon recounts some of the crazier tales from her sex-addicted, alcoholic past, which led to her finding her true self.

programme.title: Margaret Cho: Psycho
programme.desc: Comedian Margaret Cho performs in front of a live audience in this provocative and hilarious comedy special event, tackling off-limits issues.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 80's action classic! It's a Chuck Norris filled tale of moonshine, hillbillies, and sweet airbrushed eagles on the side of vans! Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Breaker Breaker!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The Mutated Sheep Embryo That Kind of Lurches Around Draggling a Vestigial Leg and Screeching of Indian Flats? Not interested! But the Godmonster of Indian Flats? Now you're talking! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: The Home of the Future
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short that takes a look at future living. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for The Home of the Future!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The Little Unicorn is a tale of whimsy, fantasy, and extremely generous definitions of the word “little.” This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60's horror classic about a satanic cult in a mysterious doll shop. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for The Devils Hand!

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: BOOKSMART is a comedy about two academic superstars and best friends on a mission to cram four years of fun into one night.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: The relationship between four female temps all working for the same credit company is threatened with the arrival of a new hire, who lands a permanent position one of the women was vying for.

programme.title: Alice Upside Down
programme.desc: Alice Upside Down is the story of an 11-year-old girl who has just moved to a suburb of Washington, D.C. with her father Ben and her 17-year-old brother Lester.

programme.title: Waiting for the Barbarians
programme.desc: A local magistrate takes up a position at a remote outpost. His distance from the heart of the government begins to take a toll on his psyche, ultimately pushing him to reassess his loyalty to his nation as a whole.

programme.title: Stonewall (2015)
programme.desc: Passions and politics make a volatile mix in this dynamic drama directed by Roland Emmerich that follows the events that led to the birth of the modern Gay Rights movement.

programme.title: Booksmart
programme.desc: BOOKSMART is a comedy about two academic superstars and best friends on a mission to cram four years of fun into one night.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: A sociopath on death row is given a chance to live if he agrees to take part in a chemical behavioral modification program. Starring Willem Dafoe, Ray Liotta and Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Crossing Over
programme.desc: This ensemble piece focuses on immigrants of different nationalities trying to achieve legal status in Los Angeles. It touches upon the issue at the border, document fraud, the asylum and green card process, work-site enforcement, naturalization, the office of counter terrorism and the clash of cultures.

programme.title: Sweet Country
programme.desc: Australian western set on the Northern Territory frontier in the 1920s, where justice itself is put on trial when an aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self defense and goes on the run as posse gathers to hunt him down. Festival favorite of Venice, Toronto, and Sundance.

programme.title: The Escape Of Prisoner 614
programme.desc: Ron Perlman (HELLBOY, “Sons of Anarchy”) is electrifying in this action-filled western about a corrupt and cold-blooded sheriff on the hunt for an escaped convict.

programme.title: Good Advice
programme.desc: An ex-Wall Street wiz finds a new niche by posing as a female advice-column writer. Can his secret stay under wraps? Romcom fun with Charlie Sheen, Denise Richards.

programme.title: The Winter Palace
programme.desc: A novelist with writer's block becomes the caretaker at an empty winter chateau to finish her book. When the owner, a prince, suddenly shows up with his entourage, her job as the caretaker includes taking orders from the royal group.

programme.title: Heart of the Manor
programme.desc: Before her sister's wedding, real estate agent Lisa is in competition with handsome developer Matthew who wants to buy her family's historic estate. But could he hold the key to Liz's heart?

programme.title: Roald Dahl's Esio Trot
programme.desc: A magical, warm–hearted family film with universal appeal. Mr Hoppy, a retired bachelor, harbours a secret passion for his neighbour, the lovely Mrs Silver. Unfortunately, she lavishes all her affection on another, Alfie, her pet tortoise. Mr Hoppy yearns to talk to Mrs Silver, but tongue-tied and shy, his attempts always end in disaster. And when Mr Pringle, a boorish next-door neighbour, asks Mrs Silver out on a date, Mr Hoppy's world falls apart. Mrs Silver's greatest wish is for her tortoise, Alfie, to grow a little bigger. All is lost for Mr Hoppy until he has the brightest and most devious of ideas to win his lady's heart. Starring Academy Award winners Judi Dench and Dustin Hoffman, ESIO TROT is endearing and wonderful for the whole family.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. The POstables work against the clock decoding a letter to rescue a soldier.

programme.title: Color My World with Love
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Emma's daughter, who has Down Syndrome, is in a new romance Emma must navigate.

programme.title: A Gift of Miracles
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Darcy finds a list of belongings her estranged mother intended to give to away.

programme.title: Love by Chance
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Without her knowledge, Claire's meddling mother finds her the perfect man.

programme.title: A Wife's Suspicion
programme.desc: A forensic investigator begins to suspect her new husband is the serial killer.

programme.title: Christie's Revenge
programme.desc: Christie vows to get revenge on the man she blames for her father's demise.

programme.title: Beware of the Midwife
programme.desc: Sarah and Kevin decide to hire a midwife. But their midwife kidnaps their newborn.

programme.title: A Wife's Suspicion
programme.desc: A forensic investigator begins to suspect her new husband is the serial killer.

programme.title: All Is Lost
programme.desc: After a collision with a shipping container at sea, a sailor finds himself staring his mortality in the face.

programme.title: The Great Debaters
programme.desc: In 1935, students at historically black Wiley College form a debate team, and go on to defeat Harvard.

programme.title: The Lucky Ones
programme.desc: Three soldiers on leave from Iraq are forced to grapple with a country divided over the war.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides
programme.desc: A group of male friends become obsessed with five sisters who are sheltered by their religious parents.

programme.title: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: A spiritual woman embarks on a dangerous quest with a convicted killer.

programme.title: Fences
programme.desc: A working-class African-American father tries to raise his family in the 1950s

programme.title: 13 Hours: The Secret Soldiers of Benghazi
programme.desc: The gripping true story of six elite ex-military operators assigned to protect the CIA

programme.title: Quicksilver
programme.desc: After losing his life savings playing the market, a trader quits his job and becomes a bicycle messenger.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: A big-city cop follows a gorgeous blond to New Orleans to avenge the murder of his partner. Edited for TV

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: A public defender pokes into places she shouldn't while trying to exonerate an innocent man accused of murder. Edited for TV

programme.title: In The Line Of Fire
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent is taunted by calls from a would-be killer who has detailed information about the agent - including the fact that he failed to save President John F. Kennedy from assassination. When the current president is threatened, the agent is determined not to let history repeat itself.

programme.title: Cover Girl
programme.desc: An ambitious chorus girl seeks a career on Broadway by entering a magazine's Cover Girl contest.

programme.title: Bunny Lake Is Missing
programme.desc: A woman reports that her young daughter is missing, but there seems to be no evidence that she ever existed.

programme.title: Gilda
programme.desc: A crooked gambler, a casino owner, and his unfaithful wife are caught up in a steamy, and deadly -- love triangle.

programme.title: Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Charlton Heston stars as Brad Braden, the circus manager who lives and breathes to keep the show rolling. With the Big Top about to hit rock bottom, Braden hires The Great Sebastian, a daring trapeze legend, to revitalize the circus.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: A submarine captain and his supply officer are determined to get their dry-dock sub back into WWII action. However, a bevy of nurses comes aboard, causing hijinks in the hot pink sub.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: The Great Waldo Pepper
programme.desc: A young stunt pilot seeks glory in a dramatic and death-defying airborne battle against an ace flyer from WWI.

programme.title: Senna
programme.desc: Senna tells the heroic story of Ayrton Senna, the Brazilian Formula One racing driver.

programme.title: Road to Zanzibar
programme.desc: The crazy Yanks are back and barnstorm their way through Africa trying to raise funds to get back to the U.S.

programme.title: Streets of Fire
programme.desc: Get ready for a rock ‘n' roll fable about a kidnapped diva and a handsome loner in this sexy, gritty thriller.

programme.title: First Blush
programme.desc: A young married couples relationship is thrown off its axis when they become involved with another woman. As they learn to navigate their new life, the trio push each others boundaries to the limits in this fresh, poignant love story.

programme.title: Limerence
programme.desc: Rosemary, an aspiring painter and free spirit, moves to Venice, California where she falls for Tom, a charismatic gallery director. Their intense chemistry quickly evolves into a serious relationship that puts Rosemary to the test.

programme.title: Conception
programme.desc: Vic and Ami are living the perfect married life, but their world turns upside down when they attempt to start a family.

programme.title: 4 Minute Mile
programme.desc: 4 MINUTE MILE is the inspirational story of a high school track star who falls on hard times. A new coach puts him on the right path but his resolve is threatened as tragedy strikes and forces him to confront everything that has been holding him back.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister's manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: Love on the Reef
programme.desc: A marine biologist and a laissez-faire dive instructor must team up to save their beloved reef.

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: When Isla's art unexpectedly sells to Mark, a second commission sees them falling in love.

programme.title: Love at First Like
programme.desc: A journalist covering the Don Juan of dating apps ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Literally, Right Before Aaron
programme.desc: Still reeling from his breakup with college sweetheart Allison, Adam's world is thrown into further chaos when he's invited to attend her wedding.

programme.title: Saving Westbrook High
programme.desc: Manny Cortez is uprooting his family so that they can go to Westbrook High where his beloved late father was the football coach. Soon after the Cortez family moves into the Westbrook school zone, however, it is announced that the beloved school will close due to budget cuts.

programme.title: Jackie, Ethel, Joan: The Women of Camelot
programme.desc: Go behind closed doors for a startlingly honest look at the three women who kept Washington's most private secrets, coped with the world's most public tragedies and discovered an unbreakable bond that would last a lifetime.

programme.title: Jackie, Ethel, Joan: The Women of Camelot
programme.desc: Go behind closed doors for a startlingly honest look at the three women who kept Washington's most private secrets, coped with the world's most public tragedies and discovered an unbreakable bond that would last a lifetime.

programme.title: The Trial
programme.desc: After the horrific death of his wife and two sons, suicide seems to be the only escape for a small town attorney, until he's assigned a capital punishment case that begins to transform his life.

programme.title: Marrying the Mafia 2: Enemy-in-Law
programme.desc: Mafia boss's son, In-jae, falls for prosecutor Jin-kyung, sparking a dilemma between love and family safety.

programme.title: Mission Possible
programme.desc: To a private investigator Woo Su-han, who will take on any job if it pays the bill, a secret agent Yoo Da-hee comes along with $10,000 in cash. She proposes a joint operation to investigate an arms trafficking case. They attract more attention when they're together and as the scope of this case increases by the minute, they leave behind evidence that put them on police's target list...

programme.title: The Battle: Roar to Victory
programme.desc: Over a 4 day period, a fierce battle takes place between Korean independence militias and imperialist Japanese forces in Manchuria, China.

programme.title: The Engagement
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy David, a Jewish American, asks Mia, a beautiful African American, to be his wife-but never dreams what lies ahead when he announces his engagement to his parents. When David's parents surprise him by hosting an engagement party, Mia's African American heritage might just give them the surprise of their lives! To make matters worse, David's parents want a traditional Jewish wedding and Mia's parents demand a traditional Baptist ceremony. As tensions rise throughout the day, will love prevail or will both families tear them apart?

programme.title: The City of Crosses
programme.desc: Two best friends come upon a murder that will derail their lives forever. They keep the secret to themselves only to share it with the girl in their circle, Samantha. As life would have it, anything hidden won't stay buried forever.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Jeff and Tisa Murray have decided to move their family back to their hometown of Atlanta when Tisa is offered her dream job. The dream becomes a hilarious reality when family issues, Mom's new boyfriend, and ex-lovers are waiting on them upon their return.

programme.title: Twerk: Reggae Nights
programme.desc: Hard-working, single mother, Iesha, learns that one of the most popular reggae artists, Domino, is holding an audition in her city for dancers in his next music video. The competition is fierce, and some of the ladies will do anything to get the job.

programme.title: The Alternate
programme.desc: The president is kidnapped while attending a charity event. Initially planned by his chief of staff to boost his poll ratings, one of the kidnappers decides the opportunity for gain is too strong and it turns into a real kidnapping. Starring Ice-T.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: The budding romance between two people with Asperger's syndrome is threatened by their emotional dysfunctions.

programme.title: Bad Lieutenant: Port Of New Orleans
programme.desc: Terence McDonagh (Nicolas Cage) isn't doing so well. He has a nasty painkiller addiction, courtesy of an injury he sustained while rescuing a prisoner during Hurricane Katrina. Plus, there's his alcoholic father (Tom Bower), boozy wife (Jennifer Coolidge) and prostitute girlfriend (Eva Mendes). And, he's just been saddled with a rookie partner (Shawn Hatosy). Now Terence must pull himself back from the edge of insanity to investigate a series of murders that has the city on edge.

programme.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: New Orleans ad executive Marley Corbett (Kate Hudson) is a free-spirited woman who embraces her easy sexuality, shuns commitment, and gains support and strength from a close circle of friends. Then Marley learns she has terminal colon cancer. Despite her determination not to be tied down in a serious relationship, Marley finds herself falling in love with her handsome doctor (Gael García Bernal), even as her health slowly deteriorates.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Framed for crimes she did not commit, a British diplomat tries to prevent a terrorist attack on New York City.

programme.title: Command Performance
programme.desc: When the Russian prime minister is taken hostage at a rock concert in Moscow, it's up to an ex-biker turned rock drummer named Joe (Dolph Lundgren, "Rocky IV") to save him.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: Lady Gaga
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on September 1, 2013 marks the superstar's first full concert since the The Born This Way Ball. It is an eight song set containing the world premiere of seven tracks from her fourth album, ARTPOP: "Aura" "MANiCURE" "Artpop" "Jewels N' Drugs" ft. T.I., Too $hort and Twista "Sexxx Dreams", "Swine" and "I Wanna Be With You", a song that transformed into "Dope" for ARTPOP. During the concert, captured stunningly in HD, Gaga says that she's "a bit like Dorothy right now." The stage is her Kansas, the crowd is her family, and their reunion is pure magic. Lady Gaga, her dancers, and her band traverse through visual and musical themes of love, sex, violence, beauty, danger, empowerment, hustle, lust, and above all ART. Throughout, Gaga lays her heart bare for the audience and the cameras with every note sung and every word spoken.

programme.title: Teresa: Celos incontrolables

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: El regreso
programme.desc: Juan regresa con sus hermanos, pero sigue sin recordarlos. Sofía le pide al comisario que detenga a Juan.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Relación expuesta
programme.desc: Karla y los demás empleados descubren a Damián en el cuarto de Braulio. Alejandro desconoce a Luciana como su madre. Constancio se rehúsa a decir la verdad a pesar de ver el cuadro de Rosario y Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Sacrificio
programme.desc: David se entera de que Perla fue asesinada y no puede evitar pensar en que Juan tuvo algo que ver. Por otro lado, Miguel le pide una oportunidad a Luciana para demostrarle todo su amor.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Remigio le propone a Adolfo matar a Manuel a cambio de su libertad. Matilde va a hablar con Remigio para que le explique el motivo del arresto de su administrador. Prudencia le dice que es una insensata por ponerse en evidencia.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Las sospechas de Santa
programme.desc: Santa sospecha que fue José Antonio el que ayudó a Octavio a llevarse a Lupita Miguel se sorprende al ver que Simona está perdiendo la cordura Maricruz les dice a todos que va a pelear por su hija y buscará a Octavio para arreglar la situación.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Pasión desenfrenada
programme.desc: Hilario le dice a Sanjuana que su relación no funcionará y se despide de ella para siempre. Francisco busca a Isadora para pasar una noche apasionada con ella.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 80
programme.desc: Una de las hijas de María Mercedes está en peligro de morir.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 49
programme.desc: Sergio le confiesa a Bella que la ama y le pide que no se case con el gobernador. Natalia amenaza a Bella de que si casa con su padre, se arrepentirá.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 50
programme.desc: Bella lee el periódico y se entera que Sergio se casará con Natalia, ella hace un plan para impedir que se lleve a cabo esa boda.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 69
programme.desc: Soraya intenta escapar de la ciudad para evitar ir a prisión, pero las autoridades logran arrestarla. Alicia se niega a testificar en contra de Soraya a pesar de todo el daño que le ha hecho. Aldo le pide a Abelardo no defender a Soraya.

programme.title: María la del Barrio Capítulo 70
programme.desc: María logra convencer a Alicia de presentarse al juicio de Soraya. Abelardo descubre que Aldo testificará en el juicio de Soraya a favor de Nandito.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 81
programme.desc: María Mercedes sufre al saber que una de sus hijas murió.

programme.title: María Mercedes Capítulo 82
programme.desc: Mística le confiesa a María Mercedes que está embarazada y Jorge Luis es el padre de su hijo.

programme.title: Marimar Capítulo 51
programme.desc: Corazón se encuentra con Sergio y ella no duda en contarle a Marimar. Marimar se entera que la esposa de Renato pronto llegará a Valle Encantado.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Rosendo se vuelve el principal sospechoso de la golpiza de José Miguel. Ivana golpea a Rosendo por haber mandado a golpear a José Miguel y él la cachetea, pero ambos se dejan llevar por la pasión y se besan.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina le aclara a Crisanta que no es amante de Rosendo. Valentina cuestiona el pasado de José Miguel en el seminario. Alonso vuelve a comunicarse con Valentina y José Miguel teme que lo siga queriendo.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana idea un nuevo plan para separar a Valentina de José Miguel. Leonor sospecha que Isabel está interesada en Federico. Isabel le pide a Ivana que la ayude a terminar con la relación de José Miguel y Valentina.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Felipe descubre que Rosendo está enamorado de Valentina. Ivana asegura que Gabriela solo viajó al pueblo para estar cerca de Felipe. Benita se alegra al ver que Valentina es ahora una buena mujer.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le reclama a Diego por mandarlo matar. Hipólita se entera cuál es el verdadero nombre de Luis. Por su parte, Luis le dice a Esperanza que quiere anular su matrimonio.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Diego le pide a Juana que le arregle una cita con Hipólita antes de que Luis le gane. Por su parte, Perla va a buscar a Cristóbal para que le ayude a leer una carta pero encuentra a Luis primero y él se da cuenta que es una carta de su familia.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le advierte a Diego que se mantenga alejado de Hipólita. Luis le dice a Ada que sabe muchas cosas de Hipólita y que sabe de su hijo para ver si ella lo confirma.

programme.title: Alborada
programme.desc: Luis le pregunta a Hipólita si tuvo algún hijo fuera de matrimonio y ella sospecha que es el padre de su hijo. Además, ella decide aceptar la ayuda de Diego.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Secreto descubierto
programme.desc: Damián le confiesa al padre Guadalupe que él no le disparó a Gabino. Ingrid le pide a Damián que no diga que fue ella quien disparó el arma.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Locura sin control
programme.desc: Isabel es trasladada al reclusorio. Valentina le pide a Isabel que confiese el nombre del verdadero asesino para que pueda volver a la hacienda. Valentina descubre que Ivana se está volviendo loca.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Recuperación
programme.desc: Paulina convence a Carlitos de usar las muletas para iniciar su recuperación. Gema se aprovecha del distanciamiento entre Carlos y Paola, para proponerle que estén juntos.

programme.title: El manantial: Enemistad en puerta
programme.desc: Gilberto y Alejandro visitan a Alfonsina y ella aprovecha la ocasión en su beneficio. Héctor termina con Malena ya que tiene sentimientos por otra.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Situaciones ocultas
programme.desc: Leonardo llega al funeral de Marcelo y acusa a Eugenio de ser el autor de todos los crímenes. Elisa teme que Leonardo descubra cosas sobre ella y la denuncie.

programme.title: La Gata: Amor prohibido
programme.desc: Pablo le declara todo su amor a Esmeralda y le dice que no podría estar separado de ella. Por otra parte, Lorenza busca a Pablo y le dice que no tendrá una relación con Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Amor resignado
programme.desc: Rogelio le pide a Ana Paula que se vaya de la hacienda. Macaria le pide a Ulises que le confiese si él siente un interés por Rocío. Ana Paula intenta enamorar de nuevo a Rogelio. Cynthia se molesta con Gustavo, ya que sigue interesado en Ana Paula.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Ayuda por conveniencia
programme.desc: Raquel le pide a Bruno que no ayude a María José a recuperarse. Bruno le dice a Alex que ayudará a María José si le cede la presidencia de la empresa y se divorcia de ella. María José se entera de que Bruno fue quien le donó sangre.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: De regreso al trabajo
programme.desc: Ludovico regresa a trabajar a la empresa de Don Camerino encargándose de sacar las copias. Ludovico deja a Flavio encargado de la copiadora, él saca copias de su trasero y las mandan en lugar de un reporte a todos los jefes de área.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Fofo, el hermano de Paco, llega de visita a México, sin esposa y acompañado de una pareja un poco particular.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Macarena está por casarse y no tiene dónde hacer su despedida de soltera. Paco le ofrece su departamento para el festejo.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Rocío le reclama a Fran por tener que ir a recogerlo a la cárcel. Fran le cuenta a Rocío cómo terminó en la cárcel. Doña Ruperta, la vecina de Paco, le reclama porque ningún vecino pudo dormir por la fiesta que hizo. Los vecinos de Paco hacen una junta.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Un comercial anuncia cómo poder deshacerse de los locutores por medio del dispositivo "ALM". El doctor Frías resolverá las dudas de las personas en el show Medicazos de la vida real.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer analiza las frases que dicen los mexicanos. El cirujano plástico Busto Derrocha. Peliculeando con Bere Nice y Don Oscar Ariel Indio Fernández.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Los empleados del hotel confunden a la mamá del dueño con otra mujer. Don Chava se enamora de la mamá del patrón y trata de conquistarla, pero ella lo desprecia.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Vítor le organiza una fiesta de quince años a su mamá porque nunca pudo celebrarlos y le pide a todos sus compañeros que lo apoyen siendo padrinos de su madre.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano están a punto de ser expulsados del condominio, pero se hacen amigos de sus vecinos en una fiesta y les permiten quedarse.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Albertano y Vítor deciden cambiar su apariencia drásticamente para conquistar mujeres, pero optar por volver a su vida normal después de ver que el plan no funciona.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María de Todos los Ángeles es una mujer que siente que se está haciendo vieja sin haber encontrado el amor de su vida. Ella tiene un sueño en el que los ángeles anuncian que pronto el amor de su vida va a llegar.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: María decide provocar un encuentro con Albertano para verlo directamente a los ojos y descubrir si es el amor de su vida. La vida de Albertano corre peligro y María se arriesga para salvarlo.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Plácido acaba de recordar que es su aniversario de bodas con Renata, por lo que le organizará una cena romántica. Martina invita al cine a la familia a ver el estreno de una película.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Aldolfo pierde el bono huachicolero por bañarse, y con la ayuda de Jacinta se convierte en hierbero. Carlos recibe regalos de un admirador secreto.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel intenta que Mia reaccione y busca la manera de salir de la isla Don Cosme abofetea a Giovanni por renegar de ser pobre Roberta besa a Roger y Diego le dice que Verónica ya es su novia Miguel encuentra una lancha y al regresar Mia no está.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel le promete a Mia no dejarla sola nunca más Franco cree que Alma y Guillermo tuvieron relaciones sexuales Leonardo le demuestra su apoyo a Celina al verla deprimida por la trampa del video Gandía castiga injustamente a los alumnos.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Leonardo golpea a Rocco por defender a Celina. Gandía piensa que el busto que le regalaron los alumnos contiene una bomba.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia tiene un altercado con Sol, por adueñarse de su cuarto Pilar le hace creer a Vico que Giovanni la engaña Franco cree que Mia tuvo relaciones Leonardo intenta que Lola quiera a Lupita la banda RBD se reúne para acordar en dónde ensayarán.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía se enfurece al ver que Sol coquetea con Miguel. El Sr. Mendiola le avisa a Gandía que está despedido. Lola no acepta hablar con Lupita. Gandía le avisa a Pilar que la sacará del colegio porque ya no podrá pagarlo.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual anuncia su despido de la institución, todos lloran y no saben si decir la verdad para defenderlo ante el comité para que lo perdonen.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía se enoja al ver llegar a Sol y a su amiga a los ensayos de RBD. El enojo la hizo decidir terminar con el grupo. Llega el nuevo director.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: El nuevo director quiere que se lo respete y que mejor que ponerse contra los alumnos e imponerse cortándole el cabello a Santos, lo que hace que todos lo odien aún más.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Fernanda entristece al saber que Damián es el responsable de haber dejado la empresa de Gonzalo en quiebra. Damián enfurece al saber que Bárbara lo traicionó.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Damián le pide a Vladimir que lo ayude a recuperar el dinero que Bárbara le debe. Eduardo descubre que Damián es un estafador. Fernanda le pide a Eduardo una gran cantidad de dinero para evitar que la empresa de Gonzalo quede en la quiebra.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Aníbal acusa a Fernanda de provocar que la empresa de Gonzalo esté en la quiebra. Fernanda idea un plan para demostrar que Damián no es un ladrón.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre
programme.desc: Los planes de Vladimir prosperan y logra que Priscila se interese. Dominga se pone furiosa por el escape de Aurora.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Federico forcejea con Cristina y cae desde el primer piso de la casa. Cristina llama al doctor Robles para que ayude a Federico después de la caída. Juliana visita a Damiana en el hotel para proponerle suplantarla por un tiempo.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Federico no siente las piernas cuando despierta en el hospital. Damiana y Juliana son las únicas que acuden al funeral de Porfirio. Raquela se manifiesta en el cuarto de Federico, diciéndole que no puede escapar de la maldición.

programme.title: Abrázame muy fuerte
programme.desc: Cristina se desvanece en el consultorio del doctor Robles. José María sufre un accidente mientras Raquela se encuentra cerca. Deborah se entera de que Cristina tuvo una hija.

programme.title: Las rosas del milagro
programme.desc: La historia de la aparición de la Virgen de Guadalupe al indio Juan Diego en México.

programme.title: Mamá, soy Paquito
programme.desc: Paquito sufre la muerte de su madre a temprana edad, quedando a merced de la pobreza y la miseria.

programme.title: Natacha
programme.desc: Al morir su madre, una joven sale del convento donde estudia y trabaja como sirvienta en una casa rica.

programme.title: Tres Noches de Locura
programme.desc: Tres mujeres experimentan varias aventuras diferentes entre sí y algunas de ellas tienen finales trágicos.

programme.title: El día de las madres
programme.desc: Los habitantes de una vecindad su reúnen para celebrar el "Día de las madres" y reconocen el sacrificio de ellas.

programme.title: Los tres bohemios
programme.desc: Tres compadres tratan de alcanzar el éxito y dinero con su carrera musical. Sin embargo, sus ingresos limitados ocasionan retrasos en el pago de su renta en la vecindad en donde viven, y los meten en problemas para cubrir sus necesidades de alimento.

programme.title: Mi mujer no es mía
programme.desc: Un hombre pasa los días tranquilo pues todo parece marchar de maravilla en su vida, hasta que un día, inesperadamente comprende que su fiel esposa no le pertenece y su vida se vuelve muy triste.

programme.title: Dos corazones y un cielo
programme.desc: Antonio e Isabel son esposos y la pareja de cantantes más famosa de México. Cuando deciden separarse profesionalmente para seguir sus carreras en solitario, su matrimonio se ve amenazado por un empresario español y una chocolatera italiana.

programme.title: Pancho López
programme.desc: Un par de hombres deshonestos, aseguran haber sido robados por un bandido, pero cuando la ley entra a investigar, deberán encontrar a quien se haga pasar por ese criminal o tendrán consecuencias muy caras.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un joven comienza a salir con un chico, pero su hermano y su ex novio se preocupan porque piensan que es un asesino serial que ha estado matando mujeres en su colonia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Un padre de familia golpea a su esposa e hija, la joven planea huir con su novio, pero el hermano de la chica regresa, él denuncia a su padre para que lo detengan y ella no se va.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Una joven y su familia desperdician el agua, el hijo más pequeño les pide que ahorren el agua, pero no lo escuchan. Por accidente su casa se incendia y no tienen agua para combatir el fuego.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Hechos son amores y no buenas razones
programme.desc: Una mujer es presa del alcoholismo y no logra ver lo que su nuevo novio quiere hacerles a sus hijas. El novio de la joven esposa entrena mujeres solas y secuestra a sus hijos para forzarlas a ser mulas del narcotráfico.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: This is the new Bugatti Tourbillon, the successor to the Veyron and the Chiron, due to be delivered in 2026. Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

programme.title: No Perfect Formula
programme.desc: No Perfect Formula follows Cadillac Racing's meticulous journey to the forefront of endurance racing, charting the creation of the Cadillac V-Series.R race car from inception to the high-stakes competition at the 24 Hours of Le Mans. This documentary reveals the relentless pursuit of innovation by the Cadillac team, their strategies against legendary teams like Porsche and Ferrari, and the personal stories of team members and drivers united by a single dream. Capturing the essence of resilience and the spirit of competition, it's a testament to the belief that in racing, as in life, there's no perfect formula for success.

programme.title: Revelations with Jason Cammisa
programme.desc: In this episode of Revelations, host Jason Cammisa dives into the story of Toyota's 2000GT, which was one of the fastest cars in history. Next, Jason gives us the fascinating history behind the Datsun (Nissan) 240Z.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: In part 1 of this episode, Henry Catchpole takes us to the F.A.T. Ice Race in Aspen, CO, which must be the coolest car event on the planet. Where else could you hope to see the 1998 Porsche 911 GT1 that won Le Mans sliding around on snow alongside a genuine Police Mini? At this inaugural running of the US edition of the F.A.T. Ice Race, Henry Catchpole soaks up the atmosphere, hitches a lift in a Group B Audi Sport Quattro S1 and drives three very different cars… and a piste basher!In part 2 of this episode, Henry jumps in what could be the last ever V10-powered Audi R8.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Henry Catchpole is back on his favorite topic: Rallying! Of all the WRC Group B rally cars, the Lancia Delta S4 is the wildest, which makes the Stradale (or street version) very special indeed. Lancia was meant to build a couple of hundred to satisfy the homologation rules of Group B at the time, but someone was clearly a bit lax with their counting as it's thought only around 70 or 80 were ever made. This is chassis number 033.Next, Henry jumps in a Lotus Elise restomod that features some unique touches inspired by the legendary McLaren F1 supercar.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Part 1: Henry Catchpole reviews Prodrive's INSANE Subaru restomod, the P25.Part 2: Henry plays a little game of "2-Car Solution," but with an interesting twist: two cars, same engine?

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Part 1: Gateway Bronco's latest and greatest version of the iconic Ford SUV is quite the restomod. Not only does the Luxe-GT have the sort of paint job that makes it look like a ray of sunshine wherever you park it, there is also a brand new chassis underneath. Gateway claims that this imparts the type of performance usually only found in modern SUVs. Part 2: After reviewing the Alfaholics Giulia Super R 270, Henry Catchpole thinks this might just be the one car to rule them all. Why? Well it has both verve and versatility. It is a restomod, so you have all the glorious interactivity and tactility typical in such a creation - think Singer, Eagle, Kimera and a whole host of others, including Alfaholics' own GTA-Rs. But then add more than a dash of practicality. With back seats and a decent boot, this is suddenly a car that will happily tackle a whole host of tasks not normally associated with restomods.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: In part 1 of this episode, Henry Catchpole finally gets to drive the incredible Aston Martin Valkyrie. Under the spectacular floodlights of the Sakhir F1 Circuit in Bahrain, we got some answers as to whether this hypercar developed with Red Bull lives up to the promise of being one of the all-time greats. In part 2, Henry drives the all-new Aston Martin DB12, which represents the first of a new generation of the legendary DB nameplate.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: In part 1 of this episode, Henry drives Mercedes' SLS AMG Black Series and AMG GT Black Series, two of the wildest, rarest, most expensive (and longest-named) cars ever to emerge from Affalterbach. But the reason they feel so extreme might not be the one you imagine.In part 2, another famous Mercedes take center stage as Henry reviews a wild restomod version of the McLaren Mercedes SLR HDK.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: In part 1 of this episode of The Driver's Seat, Henry Catchpole drives the new Caterham Super Seven 600. After than, he has the extraordinary opportunity to drive Eddie Hall's Derby Bentley. Eddie Hall was the only driver to ever complete the 24 Hours of Le Man by himself.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Living in a century home, Kjirsten and John had their bathroom remodeled with a custom slate tile shower, featuring built-in bench seating. Soon afterwards, they notice a strange substance leaching out of the tile grout and that the shower doesn't drain properly. When the bathroom ceiling starts to peel away, they realize something is wrong below the surface. Mike confirms their beautiful looking, new slate shower, is only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Tag along as Mike figures out why an icy townhouse attic is making snow cones.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane, a single mom, lives in a typical new home development with her two kids. Since the day they moved into the brand new home, they have been plagued with repeated plumbing and heating issues. During a recent winter cold spell, the porch ceiling caved in, exposin g questionable minimum building code practices and building materials- luckily, Mike and his team have the right answers.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Explore the downsides of custom building as Mike tours a headache of a house.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join us on a spirited journey as we explore the rich history of Applejack and Apple Brandy, discovering their colonial origins and witnessing the meticulous distillation process at America's oldest distillery. Chef Walter Staib returns to the historic Harriton House to fire up some apple-inspired recipes, including Scallopini of Pork with Stuffing, a sizzling Apple Flambé, and more.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.sub-title: Savoring Oaxaca - The Spirit of Mezcal
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib travels into the heart of Oaxaca, Mexico to embark on a captivating journey that uncovers the art of Mezcal making, guided by local experts who reveal the secrets behind this beloved spirit. The mysteries of the ancient city of Monte Albán await discovery, while renowned Mexican Chef, Rodolfo Castellanos showcases the vibrant flavors of the central market's local cuisine.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.sub-title: Flavors of the High Country - Boone, North Carolina
programme.desc: Journey back in time to uncover Boone's historic roots and savor its vibrant culinary scene. Chef Walter Staib tries his hand at fly-fishing and connects with modern pioneers shaping the region's food culture. Delve into the historic Tatum Cabin, where delightful recipes are prepared, capturing the essence of Boone's heritage.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.sub-title: Paris of the Pacific - New Caledonia
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib travels to the enchanting Pacific island of New Caledonia and discovers the harmonious fusion of French and indigenous Kanaky culture and the mouthwatering cuisine born from this blend. From a centuries-old Bougna recipe to the French pastry shops that dot the capital city, New Caledonia is a culinary treasure.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E05
programme.desc: In this episode, we "hang" with some friends abseiling over Southbank Parklands! Then we gather our courage and ascend the Story Bridge. Next, we mount some horses and find ourselves prospecting for gemstones at Thunderbird Park. Finally, we pull over and unwind in koala territory up on Mount Tambourine.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E06
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover where Australia begins by embarking down the Mulgrave River on an exclusive day tour out to the Frankland Islands. Next, we explore a bit of cultural history by spearfishing alongside the Daintree Rainforest. Then we go full eco-touristic while visiting a revered sanctuary of wildlife, Hartley's Crocodile Adventure! Ultimately, we arrive at Fitzroy Island Retreat. Enough said!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E07
programme.desc: In this episode, we pursue the spirit of ambition while discovering Hawaii's immortal culture! From walking the hallowed grounds of Hilo Coffee Mill to witnessing the reinvention of traditions at Old Lahaina Luau- this episode represents the best of what is to be expected while traveling wide-eyed through paradise!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E08
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit The Island of Hawaii better known as “The Big Island.” Here, we explore the history and geography of the islands, learn how to Hula Dance, visit a tranquil secluded retreat, learn the art of lei-making, and have some sea and land adventures!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E09
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the taste of pacific cuisine. From Hawaiian fusion and the beloved coffee bean to New Zealand oysters and tropical fish, Didiayer shares a variety of tastes around the pacific rim.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E10
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore culture old and new through a variety of unique destinations. Whether it be doing the Haka with a Maori tribe, weaving alpaca hair, or getting the real story behind the Hawaiian Luau, this episode dives in to the customs that bring people together.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E11
programme.desc: In this episode, we step out and in to nature to explore what adventure awaits. Amongst rappelling, zip-lining, horseback riding, snorkeling with dolphins and feeding crocodiles there is hardly a moment to catch your breath!

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E12
programme.desc: In this episode, we share some of the best places from our journey where we chose to rest our heads. High-class or just like home, these lovely accommodations are sure to fit anyone's budget and style.

programme.title: Travel with Didiayer S03 E13

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers who will stop at nothing to protect their massive tractor-trailer. Next, a young girl learns that she's been a victim of a pyramid scam when Lyndah and Lou come for her car. Finally, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah enjoy a little nightlife when they hit the club to take down an entitled princess who's high on charm, but late on her payments. But the debtor's not the only one who fights to get the car.

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Going Green and Falling Down
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: What in the World?

programme.title: Your Purpose, Unlocked

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas

programme.title: How to Be a Better You

These well-researched (and heartfelt) ideas offer inspiration for all aspects of your life, from creativity to vulnerability, from competitive sports to collaborative games. 1) A 3-step guide to believing in yourself | Sheryl Lee Ralph 2) Is it normal to talk to yourself? | TED-Ed 3) The little risks you can take to increase your luck | Tina Seelig 4) 3 ways to measure your adaptability -- and how to improve it | Natalie Fratto 5) What ping-pong taught me about life | Pico Iyer

programme.title: Secrets of the Wild

programme.title: Women of Wrestling
programme.desc: An action-packed WOW – Women Of Wrestling is ready to explode through your TV with a double dose of twin-tastic action, as the Tonga Twins lockup against the devilishly dangerous Miami Sweet Heat in the Tag Team Tournament Finals! The fabulous Lana Star unleashes her protégé Penelope Pink against the funktastic one, Foxxy Fierce plus insane six-way tag mayhem as the Heavy Metal Sisters lace up their boots and throw down against Coach Campanelli, Randi Rah Rah & Chantilly Chella!

programme.title: Women of Wrestling
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll & Chainsaw take on The Tonga Twins and Miami's very own Sweet Heat in unbelievable Triple Threat Tag Team elimination action! Plus, BK Rhythm and Glitch the Gamer team up to take on the troubled team of Kandi Krush and Keta Rush! The Disciplinarian looks to shut down Commander Sahara Spars with the help of Samantha Smart while Ice Cold makes sure Jessie Jones keeps her distance from ringside. WOW – your home for action packed wrestling!

programme.title: Women of Wrestling
programme.desc: All roads lead to an epic culmination on this week's WOW – Women Of Wrestling! Tormenta & Wrecking Ball team up to take on Princess Aussie & Leia Makoa in can't miss tag team action! The Fabulous Lana Star accompanies Penelope Pink as she goes up against the formidable Jessie Jones! And making her WOW debut, all the way from the US Army, the drill sergeant of destruction GI as she takes on the savagely smooth lyricist BK Rhythm!

programme.title: Women of Wrestling
programme.desc: Kandi Krush learns who destroyed her beloved grandmother's boxing gloves and she wishes to settle the score – but David McLane has other ideas. With Jessie Jones' interruptions finally eliminated, Ice Cold and Foxxy's much anticipated match finally takes place. The Main Event will crown the new WOW World Tag Team Champions when The Tonga Twins: Kona and Kaoz, face off against Miami's Sweet Heat: Laurie and Lindsey Carlson.

programme.title: Women of Wrestling
programme.desc: The night of action kicks off with a tag team showdown between Coach Campanelli & Randi Rah Rah and Gigi Gianni & Adriana Gambino whose drama will surprise fans before the bell ever sounds! programme.title: Women of Wrestling
programme.desc: Last week we learned in an exclusive interview with David McLane that The Beast has thrown her crutches to the side – and that her ankle rehab is over! With the crutches pushed aside, The Beast will return to WOW in the coming weeks…

programme.title: Women of Wrestling
programme.desc: After finding the boxing gloves her grandmother gave her ripped to shreds, Kandi Krush has been on a rampage to get her hands on Chainsaw and must encounter Holidead and Voodoo on her way. But they may have other ideas in store for the boxer-turned-wrestler!

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For this challenge, the designers divided into teams of three, and they must raise their own shopping money by selling t-shirts and other designs on the streets of NYC. Once they have raised their money, they have to design a two-piece fall collection, and one look must include a piece of outerwear.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For the HP Challenge, the designers must create their own textile and design a look that is representative of their heritage. They are surprised when a member of their family comes for a surprise visit and helps them with their inspiration.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: I Get a Kick Out of Fashion
programme.desc: The designers are treated to a show at Radio City Music Hall, where they learn that they will be designing an outfit for the world-famous Rockettes to wear in an upcoming performance.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: For Heidi's challenge, the designers arrive at Babies R Us where they learn that they will be designing an outfit for their youngest clients yet—babies! In a twist of fate, they are also made to take care of “real” babies: dolls that cry when they need to be changed, fed, or burped. And if that wasn't enough, Heidi throws another twist at the designers they also must create a complementary look for the baby's mom to wear.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: In a Place Far, Far Away
programme.desc: As the designers face their final challenge before Mercedes Benz Fashion Week, they are tasked with their most difficult and creative challenge yet: making an avant-garde look inspired by L'Oreal's new line of makeup called “Electric Fantasie".

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Weak and weary from their journey, the few designers left say goodbye to NYC and return to their respective hometowns to begin working on their final collections. Tim Gunn travels to visit the designers and assess their progress. In the end, all four remaining designers must present their three best pieces to the judging panel, as the judges are left to decide who will move on to show at Mercedes Benz Fashion Week.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: It's the moment of truth for the remaining designers as they each present their final collections to an eager audience at Mercedes Benz Fashion Week. One designer is named the winner of Project Runway Season 10, and the rest are unfortunately out.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Zanna Roberts Rassi introduces everyone to 16 new designers who will be competing against each other on Project Runway Season 11.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E3: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt — A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: Happy Hour: Oktoberfest
programme.desc: Happy Hour S1E3: Oktoberfest — Immerse yourself in the lively spirit of Oktoberfest and the camaraderie of happy hour. With a blend of vivid colors and intricate details, this art collection transports you to bustling beer gardens, traditional attire, and clinking glasses.

programme.title: Happy Hour IV
programme.desc: Happy Hour S1E4 — This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.
